companyUrls.title: Company URLs or domains
companyUrls.description: Trustpilot review page URLs (e.g. https://www.trustpilot.com/review/example.com) or just domain names (e.g. example.com).

maxReviewsPerCompany.title: Max reviews per company
maxReviewsPerCompany.description: Maximum number of reviews to extract per company. Set 0 for unlimited.

filterByStars.title: Filter by star rating
filterByStars.description: Only extract reviews with this star rating. 'all' means no filter.

includeCompanyInfo.title: Include company profile info
includeCompanyInfo.description: Include a company profile summary (trust score, total reviews, star distribution) as the first result for each company.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfig.description: Select proxies to use. Apify Proxy is recommended.
